channel.title: AICloudStrategist — Writing
channel.description: Practitioner writing on FinOps, cloud architecture, AI infrastructure, and DevOps for Indian engineering leaders and CFOs. Founder-led. Enterprise-reviewed.

item.title: The Five Kubernetes Cost Questions Nobody on Your Platform Team Can Answer
item.dc:creator: Anushka B

item.title: What Your AWS Cost Explorer Dashboard Is Not Showing You
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: You open Cost Explorer. You see a number. Maybe it's ₹18 lakhs this month, up from ₹14 lakhs last month. You click around. You look at the service breakdown. EC2 is the biggest line. S3 is doing something weird. Lambda barely registers.

item.title: The 15-Minute Weekly Cloud Cost Review Every Indian Mid-Market CTO Should Run
item.dc:creator: Anushka B

item.title: Why 70% of Indian Mid-Market Cloud Accounts Have RI Coverage Below 30%
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: The belief-vs-data gap costs Indian companies ₹40–80 crore annually. Governance framework + one-afternoon action plan.

item.title: DORA Metrics for the CFO: Translating DevOps Performance to Business Outcomes
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: Four DORA metrics, translated for finance. Worked INR example shows a Low-tier team carrying ₹37L/year of hidden cost. The funding conversation that actually works.

item.title: Cost-Per-1000-Inferences: The One Number Every AI Product Team Should Know
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: Worked example across Claude Haiku, GPT-4o, and self-hosted Llama 70B. The crossover point. How to instrument it. Why pricing decisions depend on it.

item.title: The Cross-Region Egress Mistake That Quietly Tripled a GCP Bill
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: Two line items. One billing export query. ₹14 lakh recovered per year. The BigQuery query to detect it + three remediation options.

item.title: Orphaned EBS Volumes: The Quiet Compounding Cost Indian Engineering Teams Keep Missing
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: 38 volumes, 4.2 TB, ₹4.2 lakh a year — for infrastructure nobody had touched in months. The 10-minute detection command and the governance fix.

item.title: Your Reserved Instance Coverage Is Probably Under 30 Percent
item.dc:creator: Anushka B
item.description: The gap between what engineering teams believe about their RI coverage and what the billing data actually shows is the single most expensive blind spot in mid-market AWS accounts.
